title: QR Code Business Card Stand - 3D Printed Review Payment Display
description:
Professional QR code display stand designed for small service businesses, house cleaners, and independent contractors.

Features:
• Holds standard business cards (3.5" x 2")
• Angled QR code display for easy scanning
• Stable weighted base
• Clean modern design
• Available in multiple colors

Perfect for:
- House cleaners (display review QR codes at client homes)
- Mobile service providers
- Small business reception desks
- Trade show booths
- Pop-up shops

Dimensions: 85mm x 60mm x 55mm
Material: PLA (biodegradable plastic)

Note: QR code not included. Print your own QR code on adhesive paper or card stock to insert into display area.

Ships within 24 hours. Made in Vancouver, BC.
